preReview.title: Austin FC v St. Louis City SC: Estevez wants to use U.S. Open Cup pain as 'fuel' for playoffs
preReview.description: Austin FC will be hoping to strengthen their position in the Western Conference when they host St. Louis City on Sunday.

preReview.title: Austin FC vs St. Louis City SC: Estevez quiere utilizar el dolor de la U.S. Open Cup como 'combustible' para los playoffs
preReview.description: Austin FC espera fortalecer su posición en la Conferencia Oeste cuando reciba a St. Louis City el domingo.

preReview.title: Austin FC contro St. Louis City SC: Estevez vuole usare il dolore della U.S. Open Cup come 'carburante' per i playoff
preReview.description: L'Austin FC spera di rafforzare la sua posizione nella Western Conference quando ospiterà lo St. Louis City domenica.

preReview.description: O Austin FC espera fortalecer sua posição na Conferência Oeste ao receber o St. Louis City no domingo.

preReview.description: Austin FC espère renforcer sa position dans la Conférence de l'Ouest lorsqu'il accueillera St. Louis City ce dimanche.

preReview.description: O Austin FC espera consolidar sua posição na Conferência Oeste quando receber o St. Louis City neste domingo.

QAData.question: Who won between Austin FC and St. Louis City on Sun, 05 Oct 2025 00:30:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: St. Louis City won 3–1 over Austin FC on Sun, 05 Oct 2025 00:30:00 GMT.
